name: gym-supplement-inventory-billing-system
description: Offline Gym Supplement Inventory and Billing Management System

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.cpSync('frontend/dist', 'dist', {recursive: true});"
scripts.vercel-build: npm run install:frontend && npm run build:frontend
